description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem machines. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, iarray = amachint(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem machines to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the bus and/or machine quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only in-service machines at in-service plants (type code 2 or 3).
for all machines at in-service plants (type code 2 or 3).
for only in-service machines, including those at Type 1 and 4 buses.

string.description: Bus substation number (returned as 0 if the bus is not in a substation).
Bus section number (returned as 0 if the bus is not in a substation).
Number of the node to which the machine is connected (returned as 0 if the bus is not in a substation).
Wind machine reactive power limits mode; 0 if the machine is not a wind machine.
Grounding impedance data input/outout (I/O) code (1 for per unit 2 for ohms).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘CZG’).
